opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The pain in my toes is excruciating, it wakes me up at night, and now my second toe has turned completely black.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain has become unbearable over the last two days and won't stop even at rest, and I'm frightened because the toe has gone black and cold.

symptom_narrative.onset: cramping pain in the arch of the foot on walking started about 6 months ago; the constant rest pain and the black toe came on over the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: 6 months of walking pain, worsening to constant rest pain over the past 2 days
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, exquisite, unrelenting ache in the toes and foot; the walking pain earlier was a cramp in the arch
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain I've ever had — agonising, it wakes me from sleep and I can't put any weight on the foot
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the toes and arch of the right foot; the second toe is the worst and has gone black
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: used to come on only when walking, now it is constant and worse at night lying in bed
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: hanging my foot off the side of the bed seems to ease it a little; nothing else helps
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat with the foot up, and walking
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the toe is cold and looks dead; I've had tender red cord-like lumps come and go on my lower legs before
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no black toes before, but I've had the walking cramps building up for months and the tender red streaks on my legs on and off
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't weight-bear or work, and I live alone so I'm struggling to cope

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: taking a lot of them, more than the packet says

social_history_volunteered.smoking_status: smokes about 30 cigarettes a day and has done for 15 years
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, does manual labour for a living and is worried about not being able to work

objective_data_offered.value: the tip of the right second toe is completely black and looks dry and shrivelled, past the middle knuckle of the toe
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-held phone camera in home lighting; colour and extent may not be accurate

objective_data_offered.value: the skin around the black toe looks red and the foot looks pale compared with the other foot
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: colour on a phone camera is unreliable; not a clinician inspection

objective_data_offered.value: the black toe and that part of the foot feel cold to touch compared with my other foot
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own touch comparison, not a measured skin temperature
